name: MLQ8
description: Made from same DNA template as ML8 sample. Fluorescence lifetime being IRF-limited, only showing a long-lived fluorescence lifetime.

name: ML8
description: Exact structure unknown, made from same DNA template as MLQ8. Dual emissive cluster with a micro second lived decay. The cluster size is 18 or 19. Structural verification is needed.
